title: node:test, Supertest, Contracts, Properties, Fuzzing, and Fault Injection · Type-System Trace: Pure Domain Node Test
summary: Tests call live dependencies, assert only status 200, share mutable state, never vary malformed inputs, and mistake mocks or coverage for behavioral proof. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts pure domain node test increment in layered deterministic server verification matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use node:test suites, subtests, assertions, fixtures, hooks, concurrency, timers, and cleanup to prove domain decisions independently of Express.

steps.title: Node and Express server Predict Pure Domain Node Test · Theory Pure Domain Node Test
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory team handles case 1960 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to gate release on layered domain, handler, fuzz, and resource-lifecycle evidence; prove cleanup before the service deadline expires; then fail the canary while the old revision drains and prove rollback remains safe. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
